page.title: Rheumatoid Arthritis — Disease Intelligence | OSMF
page.description: Structured alterations and therapeutics for Rheumatoid Arthritis: molecular targets, clinical biomarkers, phenotypes, and ranked drugs from Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, and DGIdb.
page.hero: Disease intelligence for Rheumatoid Arthritis: 186 alterations and 544 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.

gmi_articles.title: A combination of glucosamine, chondroitin and quercetin significantly improve the symptoms of osteoarthritis and rheumatoid arthritis.
A fermented wheat germ extract significantly improves patients with severe rheumatoid arthritis.
An elemental diet for 2 weeks is as effective as prednisone in improving symptoms of active rheumatoid arthritis.
Bee venom has both a synergist and drug sparing effect when combined with drugs in the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis.
Blackcurrant seed oil is a potentially effective treatment for active rheumatoid arthritis.
Cats claw (Uncaria tomentosa) has therapeutic value in patients with active rheumatoid arthritis.
Cod liver oil (omega-3 Fatty Acids) reduces the need for NSAIDs in patients with rheumatoid arthritis.
Cod liver oil is safe and efficacious in the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis.
Curcumin induces programmed cell death and inhibits proinflammatory prostaglandin E2 production in synovial fibroblasts of patients with rheumatoid arthritis.
Devils claw is an effective and well-tolerated treatment option for mild to moderate degenerative rheumatic disorders.
Effects of sinomenine on the proliferation, cytokine production, and regulatory T-cell frequency in peripheral blood mononuclear cells of rheumatoid arthritis patients.
Fish oil and a low arachadonic acid containing diet reduce inflammation in rheumatoid arthritis.
Fish oil improves the symptoms of rheumatoid arthritis.
Fish oil supplementation reduces the need for NSAID requirement in patients with mild rheumatoid arthritis.
Folate supplementation is protective against methotrexate induced side effects to the oral and gastrointestinal systems.
Glucosamine improves symptoms of rheumatoid arthritis.
Hepatitis B vaccination is associated with a wide range of autoimmune diseases.
Mud compress therapy relieves hand symptoms in subjects with rheumatoid arthritis.
Omega-3 Fatty Acids has significant therapeutic benefits and drug sparing activity in the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis.
Selenium supplementation improves symptoms and has a drug sparing effect in rheumatoid arthritis.
Tai Chi appears safe and may be beneficial for functional class I or II rheumatoid arthritis.
Tai Chi exercise is an effective nursing intervention that can be used for rheumatoid arthritis patients.
The concomitant consumption of cod liver oil causes a reduction in the daily diclofenac sodium usage in rheumatoid arthritis patients: a pilot study.
Transient remission of juvenile rheumatoid arthritis after measles.
Tripterygium wilfordii contains a compound which improves the safety and efficacy of methotrexate treatment in rheumatoid arthritis.
Type II collagen is an effective treatment for rheumatoid arthritis.
Vitamin D deficiency is more common in RA patients and may be one of the causes leading to development or worsening of the disease.
Vitamin E exerts analgesic and anti-inflammatory activity in rheumatoid arthritis.
Yoga improves hand grip strength in rheumatoid arthritis patients.
A combination of diosmin and hesperidin (Detralex) attenuates adjuvant-induced arthritis in rats treated with methotrexate.
Brazillian black mud treatment has a protective effect in chronic experimental arthritis.
Ginger contains compounds with significant joint-protective effects in experimental rheumatoid arthritis.
Ginger extract is superior to the NSAID drug indomethacin in a rat model of rheumatoid arthritis.
Gotu kola prevents collagen II induced arthritis in mice and may provide therapeutic benefits in the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis.
Green tea consumption is possibly beneficial for the liver and brain of patients suffering from rheumatoid arthritis.
Lycopene used as anti-inflammatory nanodrug for the treatment of rheumathoid arthritis.
Mud-bath applications have an anti-inflammatory effect on Freund's adjuvant-induced arthritis in rats.
Panax Ginseng has analgesic and anti-inflammatory activity similar to ibuprofen which may be benefical in treating rhematoid arthritis.
Resveratrol inhibits the inflammatory process in an experimental model of rheumatoid arthritis.
Sesamol serves as a p53 stabilizer to relieve rheumatoid arthritis progression.

remission.spontaneous_remission_rate: 11% achieve drug-free remission (DFR) at median 74 months; most cohorts show 10-15% DFR ceiling
remission.best_intervention_remission_rate: Early aggressive treat-to-target improves DFR rates modestly; some biologic-era cohorts reach 20-25% DFR; on-drug remission rates (DAS28 <2.6) reach 40-60% with modern biologics and JAK inhibitors
remission.gap_size: Small for drug-free remission (biological ceiling is genuinely low); large gap between on-drug remission and drug-free remission
remission.barrier_type: biological (DFR); practice (on-drug remission underachieved due to treatment inertia)
remission.barrier_detail: Treat-to-target strategy is guideline-recommended but poorly implemented in routine care; many patients remain on inadequate therapy without escalation
remission.last_soc_change: 2021 — ACR guidelines added JAK inhibitors with safety caveats; IL-6 inhibitors and IL-17 added to biologics ladder; treat-to-target explicitly endorsed; first-line (MTX) unchanged since 1990s
remission.outdated_treatments: Hydroxychloroquine or sulfasalazine monotherapy as long-term maintenance (appropriate bridging, not curative); COX-2 inhibitors as primary disease management; gold salts (essentially abandoned but occasionally seen in older patients)
remission.adjunctive_emerging: Low-dose naltrexone (LDN) emerging in case series; dietary interventions (Mediterranean diet reduces DAS28 scores); HBOT in early case reports; photobiomodulation for joint inflammation
remission.frontier_signal: CAR-T cell therapy (case reports in Germany, 2023-2024 showing sustained drug-free remission); regulatory T-cell therapies; anti-CD20 + tolerogenic approaches for DFR induction
remission.notes: Manually curated from landmark trials, registries, and guidelines (disease_db_100.json). Protected from automated overwrite.
